findings.issue: A level-1 cleric has only 1st-level spell slots, so it can only prepare 1st-level spells, but the list contains Aide (Aid, 2nd), Amelioration de caracteristique (Enhance Ability, 2nd), Animation des morts (Animate Dead, 3rd) and Allie planaire (Planar Ally, 6th).
findings.correction: Keep only Benediction (Bless, 1st) and replace the four higher-level spells with 1st-level cleric spells such as Soins (Cure Wounds), Bouclier de la foi (Shield of Faith), Mot de guerison (Healing Word) and Blessure (Inflict Wounds).
